gui.archetype.selection.title: Choose Your Class
gui.archetype.rebirth.title: Rebirth: Choose New Class
gui.archetype.info.title: Class Info
gui.archetype.hover_hint: Hover over a class to see details
class.archetype.vi.name: Vi
class.archetype.vi.description: The embodiment of pure dynamics and aggressive combat. A professional killer relying on skill alone.
ability.archetype.vi.dash.name: Dash
ability.archetype.vi.dash.description: Dashes forward dealing damage to all enemies in the path.
passive.archetype.vi.fragile_wings.name: Fragile Wings
passive.archetype.vi.fragile_wings.descr: Elytra durability drains twice as fast while worn.
passive.archetype.vi.totem_aversion.name: Angelic Aversion
passive.archetype.vi.totem_aversion.desc: Holding a Totem of Undying in the offhand deals 8 damage per second.
gui.archetype.vi.elemental_dash.fire.des: Dash creates a trail of fire.
class.archetype.ram.name: Ram
class.archetype.ram.description: A hellish creature, born for destruction.
class.archetype.ram.lore_1: A hellish creature, born for destruction...
ability.archetype.ram.rage.name: Rage
ability.archetype.ram.rage.description: You enter a rage and charge forward unstoppably, creating a shockwave on collision.
gui.archetype.ram.feather_jump.name: Feather Leap
gui.archetype.ram.feather_jump.desc: With a feather in your offhand, change your ability to a leap with ground slam.
passive.archetype.ram.hot_blood.name: Hot Blood
passive.archetype.ram.hot_blood.descript: Lava and fire cannot harm you.
passive.archetype.ram.fire_conspiracy.de: Set enemies on fire with your attacks while you are burning.
passive.archetype.ram.fragile_wings.name: Fragile Wings
passive.archetype.ram.fragile_wings.desc: Elytra durability drains twice as fast while worn.
passive.archetype.ram.growth_problems.de: Shields are too small for you. You cannot use them.
passive.archetype.ram.fragile_world.name: Fragile World
passive.archetype.ram.fragile_world.desc: Tools break 2x faster, bows break 4x faster.
passive.archetype.ram.thick_skin.name: Thick Skin
class.archetype.lin_qi.name: Lin Qi
class.archetype.lin_qi.description: A physically weak mage with unstable control over his powers.
class.archetype.lin_qi.lore_1: The weakest mage of the Lin dynasty...
ability.archetype.lin_qi.random_creation: Launch a random projectile: snowball, arrow, or potion. Probabilities improve with level.
ability.archetype.lin_qi.teleport.name: Teleportation
ability.archetype.lin_qi.teleport.descri: Throw a random projectile: snowball, ender pearl, or egg. Pearl chance improves with level.
Carelessly enchants a tool held in hand
passive.archetype.lin_qi.arrow_transform: Normal arrows held in hand transform into random tipped arrows one by one.
passive.archetype.lin_qi.potion_create.d: Water bottles, splash and lingering water potions become random potions.
passive.archetype.lin_qi.growth.name: Latent Potential
passive.archetype.lin_qi.growth.descript: Attribute penalties are gradually removed as level increases.
class.archetype.ru_yi.name: Ru Yi
class.archetype.ru_yi.description: An enderman subspecies. The result of merging endermen and humans.
class.archetype.ru_yi.lore_1: A hybrid of endermen and humans...
passive.archetype.ru_yi.water_damage.des: Take 2 damage per second while in water.
passive.archetype.ru_yi.water_food.name: Dry Diet
passive.archetype.ru_yi.water_food.descr: Watery food deals 1 damage. Safe: bread, cookie, cake, golden carrot, golden apple.
ability.archetype.ru_yi.chase.name: Pursuit
ability.archetype.ru_yi.chase.descriptio: Teleport to last hit mob dealing damage. Also deals damage to yourself.
ability.archetype.ru_yi.antigravity.name: Antigravity
ability.archetype.ru_yi.antigravity.desc: Levitate last hit mob into the air, then slam them.
class.archetype.summoner.name: Summoner
class.archetype.summoner.description: An exiled bandit who took up summoning magic after being cast out from his family.
class.archetype.summoner.lore_1: Exiled from his family, he turned to the dark art of summoning...
passive.archetype.summoner.illager_peace: Illagers do not attack you. They recognize you as one of their own.
passive.archetype.summoner.villager_reje: Villagers refuse to trade without Hero of the Village effect.
passive.archetype.summoner.meat_diet.des: Only eats meat. Other food cannot be consumed.
ability.archetype.summoner.devour_line.d: Summon evoker fangs in a line. Count and damage scale with level.
ability.archetype.summoner.devour_target: Summon evoker fangs at the looked-at block. Count scales with level.
ability.archetype.summoner.devour_around: Summon evoker fangs around yourself. Count and damage scale with level.
class.archetype.morph.name: Morph
class.archetype.morph.description: A fragile creature that steals forms. Grows stronger by absorbing shapes.
class.archetype.morph.lore_1: Grows stronger by absorbing the forms of others...
passive.archetype.morph.formless.name: Formless
passive.archetype.morph.formless.descrip: Without a form, you are weakened and slowed.
ability.archetype.morph.form_shift.name: Form
ability.archetype.morph.form_shift.descr: Hold a special item to assume a creature's form.
ability.archetype.morph.form_cancel.name: Cancel Form
gui.archetype.morph.form.zombie.name: Zombie
gui.archetype.morph.form.zombie.desc: Burns in sunlight. Constant slowness. Grows stronger at night and in caves.
gui.archetype.morph.form.creeper.name: Creeper
gui.archetype.morph.form.creeper.desc: Each hit causes a small explosion.
gui.archetype.morph.form.snowman.name: Snowman
gui.archetype.morph.form.snowman.desc: Slow your enemies with your attacks.
gui.archetype.morph.form.blaze.name: Blaze
gui.archetype.morph.form.blaze.desc: Fire resistance while active. Sets every enemy you hit on fire.
progression.archetype.morph.creeper.head: Creeper
progression.archetype.morph.snowman.head: Snowman
item.archetype.rebirth_scroll.tooltip: Carries the imprint of a different fate.
advancement.archetype.root.title: Archetype
advancement.archetype.choose_class.title: New Life
advancement.archetype.choose_class.descr: With a new life, new hope
advancement.archetype.rebirth.title: Rebirth
advancement.archetype.same_class_rebirth: Spend a most precious scroll only to change nothing. Why?
Try every class at least once
advancement.archetype.ability_kill_playe: Kill another player using your class abilities
advancement.archetype.beat_minecraft.des: Thank you for participating in the mod beta test
advancement.archetype.kill_max_ram.title: Salvation of the End
advancement.archetype.kill_max_ram.descr: Kill a Ram who has reached the maximum level
advancement.archetype.kill_max_ru_yi.des: Kill a Ru Yi who has reached the maximum level
advancement.archetype.enter_end_city.des: Invade an End City while playing as Ru Yi
